visibleFields.definition: Deontology is the view that duties constrain action even when outcomes tempt us otherwise.
visibleFields.trap: Students often blur Deontology with Utilitarianism. Utilitarianism is the view that actions should maximize overall well-being.
visibleFields.mnemonic: Picture two lanes: Deontology is where utilitarianism and maximize belong. Anything pulling toward Utilitarianism is the wrong lane.
